description: Address priority issues 1-4 from 2025-06-20-review-v1.md: wire energyState to renderEnergy UI, add cable selection UI to renderCable3D, fix cable3dCalcHeatDissipation to use cable Iz instead of hardcoded 10A, and add Farsi translations for new module strings.
steps: 1. Add energyState object and wire renderEnergy UI to use it - profile buttons update state.profile, power slider updates state.powerKW, calculations use state values
2. Add cable selection UI to renderCable3D - add cable3dState.selectedCables array, buttons to add/remove cables by index, pass state to fill rate calculation
3. Fix cable3dCalcHeatDissipation to use cable Iz (rated capacity) instead of hardcoded 10A current
4. Add Farsi translations to _FA dictionary for thermal, cable3d, and energy module strings
acceptance_criteria: renderEnergy uses energyState to drive calculations with user-selected profile and power
renderCable3D allows user to add/remove cables via buttons and uses selected cables for fill rate
cable3dCalcHeatDissipation uses cable Iz values instead of hardcoded 10A
Farsi translations exist in _FA for key thermal, cable3d, and energy labels
verification: node /projects/sandbox/Claude/test-sld.js 2>&1 | grep 'Results:' should show 175 passed, 0 failed
